```{r}
  sp    <- spearman_results_rq2[[cond]]
  po    <- poly_results_rq2[[cond]]
  r_aut <- unname(boot_r_rq2$t0[paste0("aut_", cond)])
  r_com <- unname(boot_r_rq2$t0[paste0("com_", cond)])
  r_rel <- unname(boot_r_rq2$t0[paste0("rel_", cond)])
  ci    <- boot_ci_r[boot_ci_r$condition == cond, ]
  rbind(
    data.frame(condition=cond, need=TABLE_LABEL_AUT, method="Pearson",    r=r_aut,      ci_lo=ci$ci_lo_aut,   ci_hi=ci$ci_hi_aut,   stringsAsFactors=FALSE),
    data.frame(condition=cond, need=TABLE_LABEL_COM, method="Pearson",    r=r_com,      ci_lo=ci$ci_lo_com,   ci_hi=ci$ci_hi_com,   stringsAsFactors=FALSE),
    data.frame(condition=cond, need=TABLE_LABEL_REL, method="Pearson",    r=r_rel,      ci_lo=ci$ci_lo_rel,   ci_hi=ci$ci_hi_rel,   stringsAsFactors=FALSE),
    data.frame(condition=cond, need=TABLE_LABEL_AUT, method="Spearman",   r=sp$rho_aut, ci_lo=sp$rho_aut_lo,  ci_hi=sp$rho_aut_hi,  stringsAsFactors=FALSE),
    data.frame(condition=cond, need=TABLE_LABEL_COM, method="Spearman",   r=sp$rho_com, ci_lo=sp$rho_com_lo,  ci_hi=sp$rho_com_hi,  stringsAsFactors=FALSE),
    data.frame(condition=cond, need=TABLE_LABEL_REL, method="Spearman",   r=sp$rho_rel, ci_lo=sp$rho_rel_lo,  ci_hi=sp$rho_rel_hi,  stringsAsFactors=FALSE),
    data.frame(condition=cond, need=TABLE_LABEL_AUT, method="Polychoric", r=po$aut$r,   ci_lo=po$aut$ci_lo,   ci_hi=po$aut$ci_hi,   stringsAsFactors=FALSE),
    data.frame(condition=cond, need=TABLE_LABEL_COM, method="Polychoric", r=po$com$r,   ci_lo=po$com$ci_lo,   ci_hi=po$com$ci_hi,   stringsAsFactors=FALSE),
    data.frame(condition=cond, need=TABLE_LABEL_REL, method="Polychoric", r=po$rel$r,   ci_lo=po$rel$ci_lo,   ci_hi=po$rel$ci_hi,   stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
  )
})) |>
  dplyr::left_join(condition_lookup, by = "condition") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    need       = factor(need,   levels = NEEDS),
    method     = factor(method, levels = c("Pearson", "Spearman", "Polychoric")),
    text_count = factor(text_count, levels = N_TEXTS_VARIANTS)
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: tbl-rq2b-method-comparison
#| tbl-cap: "LLM–Questionnaire Correlations by Method and Condition (AI Surrogates)"
#| echo: false

method_tbl_rq2 |>
  flextable() |>
  style_apa7() |>
  set_header_labels(
    condition    = "Condition",
    pearson_aut  = "Pearson r",
    spearman_aut = "Spearman ρ",
    poly_aut     = "Polychoric r",
    pearson_com  = "Pearson r",
    spearman_com = "Spearman ρ",
    poly_com     = "Polychoric r",
    pearson_rel  = "Pearson r",
    spearman_rel = "Spearman ρ",
    poly_rel     = "Polychoric r"
  ) |>
  add_header_row(
    values    = c("", TABLE_LABEL_AUT, TABLE_LABEL_COM, TABLE_LABEL_REL),
    colwidths = c(1L, 3L, 3L, 3L)
  ) |>
  align(i = 1L, align = "center", part = "header") |>
  add_apa_note(paste0(
    "N = ", nrow(wide_rq2), " AI surrogates. ",
    "All values shown as r [95% CI]. ",
    "Pearson r and Spearman ρ computed on unrounded continuous scores; ",
    "Polychoric r computed on rounded integer scores. ",
    "All CIs: bootstrap percentile (R = ", POLY_BOOT_R_RQ2, ")."
  )) |>
  autofit()
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-rq2b-method-comparison
#| fig-cap: "LLM–questionnaire correlations by method, condition, and need (AI surrogates). Rows = need dimension; columns = correlation method. Lines = number of texts (1, 3, 5); x-axis = target word length. Shaded band and error bars = 95% bootstrap CIs. Pearson and Spearman on unrounded scores; Polychoric on rounded integer scores."
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 7
#| fig-dpi: 300

ggplot(method_plot_data_rq2,
       aes(x = target_words, y = r,
           group = text_count, color = text_count, fill = text_count)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey60", linewidth = 0.2) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ci_lo, ymax = ci_hi), alpha = 0.12, color = NA, position = DODGE) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8, position = DODGE) +
  geom_point(size = 2.0, position = DODGE) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lo, ymax = ci_hi), width = 0, alpha = 0.6, position = DODGE) +
  facet_grid(need ~ method) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(50L, 150L, 300L),
    labels = c("Short\n(50)", "Medium\n(150)", "Long\n(300)")
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = COL_AI_TEXTS, name = "Texts (n)") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = COL_AI_TEXTS, name = "Texts (n)") +
  labs(
    title    = "Pearson, Spearman, and Polychoric Correlations by Condition and Need",
    subtitle = paste0("N = ", nrow(wide_rq2), " AI surrogates; error bars = 95% bootstrap CIs (R = ",
                      POLY_BOOT_R_RQ2, ")"),
    x        = "Target word length",
    y        = "Correlation",
    color    = "Texts (n)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = THESIS_FONTSIZE) +
  theme(
    text             = element_text(family = THESIS_FONT),
    legend.position  = "bottom",
    strip.text       = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_blank()
  )
```

*Note.* Shaded band and error bars = 95% bootstrap CIs (R = `r POLY_BOOT_R_RQ2`). N = `r nrow(wide_rq2)` AI surrogates. Pearson and Spearman: unrounded scores; Polychoric: rounded integer scores.

```{r}
#| label: sec10-cleanup
#| include: false

rm(poly_results_rq2, poly_boot_ci_rq2, fmt_poly_rq2, POLY_BOOT_R_RQ2,
   boot_fn_spearman_single, spearman_results_rq2, fmt_ci_rq2,
   method_tbl_rq2, method_plot_data_rq2)
```



# 11 Export file for RQ3 (currently uncommented to not overwrite)

```{r}
#| label: export-rq3-ai

# Build codebook-aligned export for RQ3 (id, id_type, llm_*, q_*_mean, actual_words)
RQ3_EXPORT_CONDITION <- "short-3"
stopifnot("RQ3 export condition not found in d_conditions" =
            RQ3_EXPORT_CONDITION %in% d_conditions$condition)
d_rq3_ai <- d_conditions |>
  filter(condition == RQ3_EXPORT_CONDITION) |>
  left_join(
    d_persona |> dplyr::select(uuid, q_aut_mean, q_com_mean, q_rel_mean),
    by = "uuid"
  ) |>
  mutate(id_type = "AI") |>                       # 
  rename(
    id           = uuid,
    llm_aut_mean = llm_aut_m,
    llm_com_mean = llm_com_m,
    llm_rel_mean = llm_rel_m
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(id, id_type, llm_aut_mean, llm_com_mean, llm_rel_mean,
         q_aut_mean, q_com_mean, q_rel_mean, actual_words,
         condition, text_count, target_words)

saveRDS(d_rq3_ai, "../10_data/80_analyses_exports/d_rq3_ai.rds")
rm(d_rq3_ai)
```

```{r}
#| label: export-rq3-all-conditions

# All conditions version — do not filter; used by RQ3 for condition-level comparisons
d_rq3_ai_conditions <- d_conditions |>
  left_join(
    d_persona |> dplyr::select(uuid, q_aut_mean, q_com_mean, q_rel_mean),
    by = "uuid"
  ) |>
  mutate(id_type = "AI") |>
  rename(
    id           = uuid,
    llm_aut_mean = llm_aut_m,
    llm_com_mean = llm_com_m,
    llm_rel_mean = llm_rel_m
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(id, id_type, llm_aut_mean, llm_com_mean, llm_rel_mean,
                q_aut_mean, q_com_mean, q_rel_mean, actual_words,
                condition, text_count, target_words)

saveRDS(d_rq3_ai_conditions, "../10_data/80_analyses_exports/d_rq3_ai_conditions.rds")
rm(d_rq3_ai_conditions)

# ICC per condition × need (with 95% CI) — computed in cached chunk tbl-llm-icc-results
saveRDS(tbl_icc_raw,   "../10_data/80_analyses_exports/tbl_icc_raw.rds")
# ICC(2,k=3) average-measures — computed in cached chunk tbl-llm-icc2k-results
saveRDS(tbl_icc2k_raw, "../10_data/80_analyses_exports/tbl_icc2k_raw.rds")

# Word count summary per condition
tbl_word_count_by_condition <- d |>
  dplyr::group_by(condition, target_words, text_count) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean_words = mean(actual_words, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_words   = sd(actual_words,   na.rm = TRUE),
    n          = dplyr::n(),
    .groups    = "drop"
  )

saveRDS(tbl_word_count_by_condition, "../10_data/80_analyses_exports/tbl_word_count_by_condition.rds")
rm(tbl_word_count_by_condition)
```
